## Type of Change

Select the type of change (check one):

- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (fixes an existing issue)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature (adds new functionality)

- [ ] ⚡ Performance (improves performance)

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please verify:

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have commented complex or non-obvious code
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new compiler warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes on both Windows and Linux (if applicable)
- [ ] Related issues are linked and referenced
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] I have not introduced unnecessary dependencies
